findings.description: Stephen Joseph Twohig had a previously-unlinked daughter, Mary Twohig (also recorded as Florence in later records; married name Feurfile), born 11 June 1886 in Manhattan — a distinct child from the already-linked daughter Genevieve "Jennie" Ballard, despite sharing a similar birth year.
supporting_sources: New York, New York City Births, 1846-1909 civil birth registration index
1900 and 1910 U.S. federal census household enumerations

findings.description: Stephen Joseph Twohig had a previously-unlinked son, Edward Twohig, born 27 March 1891 in Manhattan, who died in infancy on 29 January 1892.
supporting_sources: New York, New York City Births, 1846-1909 civil birth registration index
New York, New York City Municipal Deaths, 1795-1949
Find a Grave Index (Calvary Cemetery, Woodside, Queens)
